name: Party Ham Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked ham, egg, breadcrumbs, scallions, parsley, and salt.
2. Mix well until everything is evenly distributed.
3. Shape into 1-inch balls using your hands or a scoop.
4. Place the ham balls on a rack in a broiler pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes, turning the ham balls occasionally to ensure even cooking.
6. In a large skillet, combine BBQ sauce and apricot jam. Heat over medium heat and stir until well blended.
7. Add the baked ham balls to the skillet and stir gently until they are heated through and bubbly.
8. Transfer the cooked ham balls to a chafing dish.
9. Serve hot immediately.
